items.title: [正面] Came for the upcoming collab, but was pleasantly s...
items.summary:
Came for the upcoming collab, but was pleasantly surprised. 

This game is great, very fun gameplay and a good horror setting. 
The game is free so I really recommend you give it a try!

Warning: This is a gacha game, so please spend responsibly. From what I hear the game is very F2P friendly and you will be able to get what you want over time. 
However, like all gacha games if you spend money you will have an advantage, then again like most gacha games this game is mostly a single player experience with little to no focus on PVP. This game also seems to give you more value than most if you do decide to spend. 

The dev team is very transparent and they have promised to release an offline client if/when the game reaches EOS, this has given me confidence that I want to support this game.

items.title: [正面] Morimens has very good yet complex mechanics with ...
items.summary:
Morimens has very good yet complex mechanics with an almost overwelming amount of content and charming art design, original setting and plot. 
YES it is a gatcha, with PvP element for enthusiast. But it's free to play and can give dozens hours of gameplay with the Campaign alone.
A must play for any card game fan. ^.-
